prompt:
Warm product-style isometric 3D illustration (intended use).
Scene: a cozy reading nook viewed from above-front isometric angle, floating on a white background with centered composition.
Subject: a wooden chair with a cream cushion, a small side table with a cup of coffee and an open book, a tall arched window with soft light.
Key details: potted fiddle-leaf fig plant on the left, a circular wool rug under the chair, warm muted palette (cream, sage green, soft terracotta), flat shading with gentle ambient occlusion.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no logos, no shadows beyond soft AO.
